title: Create protection policy for resources
display_title: Create backup and replication protection policies in Resiliency
description: In this article, you learn how to create backup and replication policies to protect your resources.
summary: This article describes how to create a backup and replication policy. The policy works for backups with Azure Backup and replication with Azure Site Recovery. A backup policy defines when backups are taken, and how long they're retained.Learn moreon the guidelines when creating a backup policy. Replication policy defines the settings for recovery point retention history and app-consistent snapshot frequency. classification_reason: Defines backup and replication policies, including default settings (e.g., 24-hour retention, snapshot frequency); contains concrete policy parameters and default values.
